species: Recently, an oxygenase-independent sterol degradation pathway was discovered in a cholesterol-grown denitrifying bacterium Sterolibacterium (S.) denitrificans.
sample_source: S. denitrificans cells were cultivated under denitrifying conditions...
cell_line: using AcmB produced heterologously in Escherichia coli BL21(DE3) cells...
strain: S. denitrificans Chol-1ST (DSMZ 13999) and T. aromatica K172 (DSMZ 6984) were obtained from the Deutsche Sammlung für Mikroorganismen und Zellkulturen.
